Fig. 3. Self-Assessment Manikin for valence, arousal, dominance ranges with 1 to 9 where 1 being very negative (valence), very calm (arousal) and very weak (dominance). On the other hand, 9 is very positive (Valence), very excited (arousal) and very strong (dominance).
